CustomField.description: When enabled, the address verification service will not overwrite the existing address fields with the verified/corrected address. The verification status and results are still recorded, but the original address data is preserved. Useful when you want to flag addresses without automatically correcting them. Disabled by default.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Keep the original address data during verification instead of overwriting it with the corrected address. Verification status is still recorded.
CustomField.label: Prevent Address Overwrite
